messages.content:
//@version=5

// Define inputs
length = input.int(10, minval=1, maxval=100, step=1, title=“BB Periods”)
dev = input.float(1, minval=0.0001, maxval=10, step=0.0001, title=“Deviations”)
fastLength = input.int(12, minval=1)
slowLength=input.int(26,minval=1)
signalLength=input.int(9,minval=1)

// Calculate macd
fastMA = ema(close, fastLength)
slowMA = ema(close, slowLength)
macd = fastMA - slowMA

// Calculate Lower band
Std = stdev(macd, length)
Lower = ((sma(macd, length)) - (Std * dev))

// Define zeroline
zeroline = hline(0, “Zero Line”, color=orange)

// Define long entry conditions
price_bearish = macd < Lower
crossed_zero = cross(macd, zeroline)
if price_bearish and crossed_zero
strategy.entry(“Long”, strategy.long)

// Define long exit conditions
profit_target = strategy.position_avg_price * 1.015
if strategy.position_size > 0 and close >= profit_target
strategy.exit(“Long Exit”, “Long”, limit=profit_target)

fix Mismatched input ‘strategy’ expecting ‘end of line without line continuation’
